pageContext.name: Hunter 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are stoked to launch a new Star Wars™ silver coin series, inspired by the Lucasfilm series, The Bad Batch™. This first release features the commander of the team, Hunter™ - a strong and loyal soldier who has extraordinary senses, allowing him to spot targets with ease. Of course, more commandos will come, so keep a look out!   Officially licensed, the reverse of the coin showcases the selective colorisation of the incredible fighter in his armor, holding his weapon of choice — the Vibroblade™. The coin also features detailed engravings to enhance the design. As a legal tender coin, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   The limited-edition coin arrives inside a wonderful Star Wars™ branded case, which includes images of the entire squad. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found at the back of the box, along with the coin's unique number.   The mintage is set at just 3,000 pure silver coins, so storm in quick before you miss out!
